vibe: Cinematic, tactile, worn, viking-era artifact, 800 AD

fonts.runic_accents: Optional Elder Futhark Web Font or standard sans mapped to runes

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento 'Tetris' for home/lobby screens. Absolute positioning over R3F canvas for game screen.
spacing_and_layout.borders: rounded-sm (Subtle roundness, no highly rounded corners. 2px to 4px max for authentic cut stone/wood feel).

buttons.primary: bg-[#8B261D] text-[#E8DCC4] border border-[#2D3136] rounded-sm uppercase tracking-widest shadow-[inset_0_0_10px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5),0_4px_6px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)] hover:bg-[#A63025] hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(198,130,52,0.6)] transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: bg-[#2A2320] text-[#E8DCC4] border-2 border-[#4A4E53] rounded-sm uppercase tracking-widest shadow-[0_2px_4px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] hover:bg-[#382D28] hover:border-[#E8DCC4] transition-all duration-300

cards.god_favor: bg-[#1A1412] text-[#E8DCC4] border-2 border-[#2D3136] rounded-sm p-4 relative overflow-hidden bg-cover bg-center shadow-[0_10px_20px_rgba(0,0,0,0.6)]
cards.god_favor_texture: Use parchment or dark stone background images with opacity blend.
cards.hud_panel: bg-[#2A2320]/90 backdrop-blur-sm border border-[#4A4E53] rounded-sm p-4 shadow-lg flex flex-col gap-2

inputs.session_code: bg-[#1A1412] text-[#E8DCC4] border border-[#4A4E53] rounded-sm p-3 font-mono text-center tracking-[0.5em] focus:border-[#C68234] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#C68234] outline-none

animations.page_entry: Staggered fade-up reveal for menu items.
animations.dice_flip: React-spring 3D rotation on the X/Y axes during reveal.
animations.bowl_lift: React-spring translateY and rotateX to reveal dice beneath.
animations.damage_numbers: Float up and fade out (translateY -20px, opacity 0 -> 1 -> 0 over 2s).
animations.hp_stone_loss: Scale down to 0 and opacity fade. Optional particle burst.

textures.description: Deep mahogany wood grain, use for 3D table texture or background overlay
Aged brown wooden board for UI panels
Old paper texture for God Favor cards or rules
Dark stone texture for background or specific stone elements

sfx_hints: Low brass horn on session start
Dull wooden clacks for dice rolls
Soft tribal drum loop ambient for background

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and configure 'Cormorant Unicase' and 'EB Garamond' from Google Fonts.
Use Vite, React, and Tailwind as requested. App is an SPA with Supabase for multiplayer sync.
Set up @react-spring/web for 3D physics illusions and animations, no actual physics library needed for dice shaking.
Apply the wood textures as background overlays with CSS mix-blend-mode (multiply or overlay) to give panels a tactile feel.
For the 3D scene (react-three-fiber), use a top-down angled camera. Map the dark wood texture to a PlaneGeometry for the table.
Implement the 'embossed' text shadow heavily on headings to simulate runic carvings.
Ensure all buttons use the 'primary' or 'secondary' carved wood classes defined above.
Ensure standard components do NOT look like default shadcn/Vercel styling. Strip standard borders and radii to fit the worn, cinematic 800AD vibe.
